{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Starhammer's abilities
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Starhammer]] possesses impossible speed, strength, invulnerability, and interstellar flight.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c10">''The Engineer'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|“Most of his powers are famous—impossible speed, strength, invulnerability, interstellar flight, and so on, but there’s one most people aren’t aware of.”<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c10" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
